title: GCA Review Queue Contract
scope: Public manual-review contract for planned GCA account intake, read-only wallet verification, 100 Web3 Radar utility credits, GCA Member review, support review, and platform profile follow-up. This file does not make public self-service claiming live.

reviewLanes.purpose: Review controlled account pre-registration intent after approved HTTPS intake is connected.
Check Base Mainnet chain ID 8453, the official GCA contract, and ERC-20 balanceOf with read-only eth_call.
Review 10,000 GCA eligibility for a planned one-time 100 Web3 Radar utility credits record after ledger activation.
Review 1,000,000 GCA eligibility for planned GCA Member status after member ledger activation.
Track support notes without overriding wallet verification, release gates, or platform safety boundaries.
Track BaseScan, GeckoTerminal, wallet-warning, and reviewer follow-up separately from user eligibility.

allowedEvidence: read-only GCA balance from eth_call balanceOf

eligibilityThresholds.walletLimit: one verified wallet per registered user
eligibilityThresholds.registeredUserLimit: one holder bonus and one member status review per registered user

safeClaims: GCA has published a public review queue contract.
The review queue contract defines planned manual-review lanes before public self-service claiming is live.
Wallet review must use read-only eth_call and ERC-20 balanceOf.
Manual support cannot override on-chain wallet-balance verification.
The official public market route is the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
doNotClaim: the review queue is a live public submission queue before controlled HTTPS deployment
100 Web3 Radar utility credits are self-service claimable before credit ledger activation
GCA Member status is live self-service claimable before member ledger activation
support can override wallet-balance verification, release gates, or public safety boundaries
review status provides trading permission, live order execution, custody, withdrawals, price support, listing approval, or completed third-party audit
